notes: Phase 2 (part 2 of 2) — per-deployment Build Lead PIN on EDP and BOM writes, reusing existing rbac_isLead. EDP: revGate_apply (applying a new EDP revision, which overwrites dep.edpRaw/edpParsed/edpHash) now requires the deployment's lead PIN. BOM: bomIngest_commit blocks re-ingest into an EXISTING deployment (link_mode='existing' — the duplicate-BOM risk) without the deployment's lead PIN; this is the gate the Stage-3 ingest comment explicitly deferred to a polish cut. Option C throughout: the gate fires only when a lead PIN is set on the target deployment, so a PIN-less deployment is never bricked. First ingest into a new deployment and all reads stay open. bom_dep_delete has no UI caller, so nothing to gate there yet. Combined with v1.6.71 (device-PIN on Master writes), all three truth documents are now PIN-guarded against clobbering. Three stamps at v1.6.72.
